offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate cash flow forecasts cause late payments. We generate weekly cash flow forecasts from bank transactions instead of manual cash flow tracking spreadsheets.
problem: lack of accurate cash flow forecasting
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on cash flow tools
DM 20-50 accounting firms with demo video
Engage in community forums for accounting solutions
try_it: Let users try weekly cash flow report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for ease
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing financial data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
